# Generated by tools/m7_war.py --write; M7 removes vanilla unit and levy unlocks.
# Non-unit advance content is retained verbatim until M8 replaces the full tree.
#Iberian Shared Land

tercio = {
	age = age_4_reformation
	potential = {
		culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:iberian_group }
	}
	
	requires = unlock_pikemen_advance
}

#Iberian Shared Naval

catalan_galley = {
	age = age_1_traditions
	potential = {
		OR = {
			has_or_had_tag = ARA
			culture = culture:aragonese
			culture = culture:catalan
			culture = { merged_culture_group_contains_culture = culture:aragonese }
			culture = { merged_culture_group_contains_culture = culture:catalan }
			AND = {
				culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:iberian_group }
				has_primary_or_accepted_culture = culture:catalan
			}
		}
	}
	
	requires = legalism_advance
}

early_iberian_caravel = {
	age = age_1_traditions
	potential = {
		culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:iberian_group }
	}

	requires = legalism_advance
}

iberian_caravel = {
	age = age_2_renaissance
	potential = {
		culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:iberian_group }
	}
	
	requires = unlock_barque_advance
}

early_iberian_galleon = {
	age = age_3_discovery
	potential = {
		culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:iberian_group }
	}
	
	requires = unlock_carrack_advance
}

square_rigged_caravel = {
	age = age_3_discovery
	potential = {
		culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:iberian_group }
	}

	allow = {
		OR = {
			has_advance = iberian_caravel
			has_advance = unlock_caravel_advance
		}
	}
}

iberian_galleon = {
	age = age_4_reformation
	potential = {
		culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:iberian_group }
	}
	
	requires = unlock_galleon_advance
}

#Iberian Unique

ara_almogavars = {
	content_priority = 1100
	age = age_1_traditions
	potential = {
		OR = {
			has_or_had_tag = ARA
			culture = culture:aragonese
			culture = culture:catalan
			culture = { merged_culture_group_contains_culture = culture:aragonese }
			culture = { merged_culture_group_contains_culture = culture:catalan }
		}
	}

	requires = feudalism_advance
}

ara_catalan_crossbowmen = {
	content_priority = 1000
	age = age_1_traditions
	potential = {
		OR = {
			has_or_had_tag = ARA
			culture = culture:aragonese
			culture = culture:catalan
			culture = { merged_culture_group_contains_culture = culture:aragonese }
			culture = { merged_culture_group_contains_culture = culture:catalan }
		}
	}

	requires = feudalism_advance
}

ara_late_almogavars = {
	content_priority = 100
	age = age_2_renaissance
	potential = {
		OR = {
			has_or_had_tag = ARA
			culture = culture:aragonese
			culture = culture:catalan
			culture = { merged_culture_group_contains_culture = culture:aragonese }
			culture = { merged_culture_group_contains_culture = culture:catalan }
		}
	}

	requires = unlock_men_at_arms_advance
}


cas_lanzas_de_castilla = {
	age = age_3_discovery
	content_priority = 1000
	potential = {
		OR = {
			has_or_had_tag = CAS
			culture = culture:castilian
			culture = { merged_culture_group_contains_culture = culture:castilian }
		}
	}
	
	requires = unlock_lancers_advance
}

por_cacadores = {
	age = age_6_revolutions
	potential = {
		OR = {
			has_or_had_tag = POR
			culture = culture:portuguese

		}
	}
	
	requires = unlock_fusiliers_advance
